stemHtml: The pilots have received clearance to taxi to the holding point of Runway 27. The current weather conditions are favorable, with clear skies and a clean runway that is free from contaminants. However, Runway 27 presents a slight 4 kt tailwind, while Runway 04 is slightly more advantageous. In light of this situation, what options are available to the pilots?

options.a: Take-off RWY 27 and file a incident report.
options.b: Request RWY 04 and file a incident report.
options.c: Request RWY 04 which will be granted immediately.
options.d: Take-off RWY 27 or request RWY 04 and wait.
